Hilton Head Island · Established Tradition

Crane'sTavern

Prime steaks, coastal seafood, and quiet candlelit evenings on New Orleans Road.

Reserve a Table View the Menu
Scroll
The House

An island institution for steak & seafood

Crane's Tavern has long been the Lowcountry's address for an unhurried dinner done properly. We serve only the finest USDA Prime grade steaks, day-boat seafood, and dishes built from the freshest ingredients the coast has to offer.

Warm wood, low light, and gracious service make every table feel like the best one in the room. Come for the prime rib, stay for the conversation.

— Crane's Tavern, Hilton Head Island
Prime
USDA Grade Steaks
Dinner Service

The Menu

French Style Onion Soup12
Served with crusty croutons, provolone & gruyere cheese
Soup du JourMP
The chef's daily creation with the finest ingredients
Traditional Shrimp Cocktail17
Large shrimp, cocktail sauce, and a wedge of lemon
Bloody Good Cocktail22
Large shrimp steamed and chilled, served adorning our homemade Bloody Mary
Stuffed Beet16
Warm poached beet stuffed with mild goat cheese, topped with pecan bread crumbs & an orange balsamic reduction
Onion Rings12
A hearty order of beer battered onion rings
Oysters ★MP
The chef's daily preparation
Prime Meatball ★14
Topped with melted brie, served over a garlic crouton with Marsala brown gravy & parsley
Sashimi Tuna ★16
Served with a chiffonade of spinach, crispy wontons & a spicy soy dipping sauce
Crab Cake ★19
Pan seared and served with a roasted red pepper aioli & fried capers
The Tavern Roll ★16
Shaved beef blended with blue cheese & caramelized onions, rolled and baked in a phyllo crust, with Choron sauce
Garden10
Mixed greens, sliced tomato, carrots & cucumber, choice of balsamic, raspberry vinaigrette, blue cheese or ranch
Caprese16
Jumbo vine ripe tomatoes, fresh mozzarella & shaved red onion tossed with a fresh pesto dressing
Spinach Salad13
Tossed with crispy bacon, red onion & blue cheese crumbles with a raspberry vinaigrette
The Traditional Caesar ★13
Crispy romaine, parmesan cheese & croutons tossed with a classic Caesar dressing
The Classic Wedge15
Crisp iceberg with marinated grape tomatoes, bacon & shaved red onion, blue cheese dressing

Enhancements

Add Anchovies or Crumbled Blue Cheese — 2.50

Crane's serves only the finest USDA Prime grade steaks. Each selection is served with a choice of mashed potatoes, french fries, or scalloped potatoes, and a choice of creamed spinach or the chef's vegetable du jour.

Add to Any Stock Yard Selection

Single Lobster Tail MP  ·  Crab Cake 19  ·  Sauteed Button Mushrooms 5  ·  Au Poivre 6
Blue Cheese Sauce 6  ·  Pittsburgh Preparation, Rare Only 4
Jack Daniel's & Mushroom Demi-Glace 6  ·  Choron Sauce 6

The chef's selections are served with the chef's vegetable du jour.

Ravioli27
Three cheese ravioli tossed with roasted garlic & arugula in an alfredo sauce. Add grilled chicken or shrimp — 33
Low Country Shrimp ★29
Shrimp lightly sauteed & served over white cheddar grits with creamy corn, bacon & green onion
Tuna ★42
Sashimi grade tuna seared rare over noodles tossed with carrots, cabbage, scallions & a sesame ginger sauce
Salmon ★38
North Atlantic salmon grilled over rice, topped with lemon oregano spinach, sundried tomatoes & pinenuts
Lobster Tails ★MP
One or two tails lightly seasoned, broiled & served with rice pilaf & drawn butter
Scallops ★45
Blackened day boat scallops, seared & served over rice with a tomato beurre blanc
Crab Cakes ★39
Pan seared with rice pilaf, a roasted red pepper aioli and fried capers
Chicken ★29
Grilled boneless breast topped with pesto, brie & herb bread crumbs over mashed potatoes
Pork Chop ★39
Herb grilled Duroc pork chop over mashed potatoes with a peach brown sugar reduction
Braised Beef ★32
Sirloin tips slowly braised with root vegetables & a red wine reduction over mashed potatoes
Calves Liver ★29
Sauteed & served with mashed potatoes, topped with sauteed onions and bacon
Meatloaf24
Smothered with a ketchup rub, baked and served with mashed potatoes and gravy
A 20% gratuity is added for parties of six or more
In consideration of other diners, Crane's kindly requests that patrons refrain from using cellular telephones in the dining room.
